revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八王子神社 (船橋市)]]


{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
 |name=Hachioji Shrine
 |location={{coord|35|44|38|N|140|03|45|E}}
 |A11ress=Kowakama 161, Funabashi City, Chiba Prefecture
 |Established=[[807]] ({{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|qid=Q295082|lt=Daido (Japan)|1=Datong (disambiguation)}} 2)
 |Historical Rank=Village Shrine
 |deity={{ill|Amenohohi no Mikoto|ja|天之忍穂耳尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenohohi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
 |festival=October 7
 |Main Hall Style={{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|en|Shinmei-zukuri|qid=Q930545|lt=Shimmei-zukuri|1=Shinmei-zukuri}}
 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
|image=File:Hachioji Jinja (Funabashi) 02.jpg
|prefecture={{ill|Funabashi|qid=Q271417|1=Funabashi}}
 |coordinates={{Coord|35.743889|N|140.0625|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
 |architecture_style={{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|qid=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}}
 }}

'''Hachioji Shrine''' (八王子神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|qid=Q271417|lt=Funabashi City|1=Funabashi}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}, within the Kowakama district. Its historical Rank under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} is "Village Shrine." Every seven years, the shrine participates in the grand festival known as the {{ill|Shimousa Miyama's Seven-Year Festival|ja|下総三山の七年祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimousa Miyama's Seven-Year Festival|1=Shimōsa Miyama Seven-Year Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11361280}}, where its mikoshi (portable shrine) is featured as the "youngest son." The shrine grounds, covering an area of 1.08 hectares, are designated as a {{ill|local environmental conservation area|ja|郷土環境保全地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/local environmental conservation area|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Deities ==
* {{ill|Amenohohi no Mikoto|ja|天之忍穂耳尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenohohi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}}
* {{ill|Toyouke no Mikoto|ja|豊受姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Inari|ja|倉稲魂尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3080728}}

== History ==
According to shrine lore, Hachioji Shrine was established in {{ill|807|en|807|qid=Q30016|lt=807|1=807}} (Daido 2) as the local {{ill|chinju|ja|鎮守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/chinju|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鎮守神|1=Chinjugami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97479976}} of the Kowakama area. It is considered one of the region's ancient shrines. Its main shrine is believed to be the {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八王子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Osaka)|1=Hachioji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391618}} in {{ill|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|ja|大阪市東成区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashinari-ku, Osaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, located in Naka-honmachi 4-chome.

{{right|
[[File:hachiouji.jpg|thumb|200px|Torii gate and approach]]
[[File:hachiouji1.jpg|thumb|200px|Full view of the shrine]]
}}

== Parish Area ==
The shrine serves as the tutelary shrine for the northern areas of Funabashi City, including Kowakama, Tsuboi, and Kanahori neighborhoods.

== A11ress ==
Kowakama 161, Funabashi City, Chiba Prefecture

== Annual Events ==
* '''New Year's Festival''' (January 1, early morning)
* '''Obisha Ceremony''' (January 11 and 20, around 11:00 AM)
* '''First Hayashi Performance''' (3rd Sunday of January, around 10:00 AM)
* '''Annual Grand Festival''' (October 7)

== Transportation ==
'''Nearest Stations''':
* {{ill|Tōyō Rapid Railway Line|en|Tōyō Rapid Railway Line|qid=Q843148|lt=Tōyō Rapid Railway Line|1=Tōyō Rapid Railway Line}}: Approximately a 20-minute walk from {{ill|Funabashi-Nichidaimae Station|en|Funabashi-Nichidaimae Station|qid=Q5366251|lt=Funabashi Nichidai-mae Station|1=Funabashi-Nichidaimae Station}}.
* {{ill|Shin-Keisei Electric Railway|en|Shin-Keisei Electric Railway|qid=Q841573|lt=Shin-Keisei Electric Railway|1=Shin-Keisei Electric Railway}} and Tōyō Rapid Line: From {{ill|Kita-Narashino Station|en|Kita-Narashino Station|qid=Q6417578|lt=Kita-Narashino Station|1=Kita-Narashino Station}}, take the Funabashi Shin-Keisei bus to Kowakama Crossing, then walk for 5 minutes.

== Related Articles ==
* {{ill|Chiba District, Chiba|en|Chiba District, Chiba|qid=Q5095301|lt=Chiba District|1=Chiba District, Chiba}}
* {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|qid=Q1053695|lt=Shimousa Province|1=Shimōsa Province}}
* {{ill|Toyotomi Village (Chiba)|ja|豊富村 (千葉県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village (Chiba)|1=Toyotomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11633400}}
* {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|qid=Q271417|lt=Funabashi City|1=Funabashi}}
* {{ill|Ninomiya Shrine (Funabashi)|ja|二宮神社 (船橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninomiya Shrine (Funabashi)|1=Ninomiya Shrine (Q11371511)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371511}}
* {{ill|Shimousa Miyama's Seven-Year Festival|ja|下総三山の七年祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimousa Miyama's Seven-Year Festival|1=Shimōsa Miyama Seven-Year Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11361280}} ({{ill|Chiba Prefecture Designated Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|千葉県指定無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Prefecture Designated Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}})

== External Links ==
* [https://hachioji-jinja.com/ Hachioji Shrine Official Website]
